scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.db:migrate: npm -w backend exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: npm -w backend exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: npm -w backend exec prisma migrate reset
